title: Explore The Lands
description: A modpack focused on exploration, conquering dungeons and defeating new bosses with your friends!
body:
This is a modpack fully focused on exploration and boss fighting.
We have included multiple different mods adding huge dungeons and exciting bosses to fight with your friends for new gear.

This modpack also features some tech mods to simplify the automation of getting ressources.
This pack offers everything from ice breathing dragons to giant knights wielding huge swords.
We have something for every playstyle in store and every dimension gets it's overhaul and additions.
Whether you like fighting, exploring, building, magic or doing advanced tech stuff this modpack has something in store for you!


The mod "Aquaculture 2" along all its content belongs to the right copyright owners and the mod can be found under: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
